[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10000010 2
1 10010111 5
2 10110111 6
3 00001100 2
4 01001010 3
5 01000000 1
6 00111010 4
7 00101011 4
